name: Infinite Campus K-12 SIS API
what_it_does: Infinite Campus REST API for K-12 student information system (SIS). Enables AI agents to access student enrollment and demographic data, retrieve grade and assessment records, manage attendance and scheduling, access special education (IEP) and 504 plan data, retrieve staff and course data, integrate with district reporting systems, access parent communication records, handle state reporting data, and connect student data with educational technology platforms and third-party learning tools.
use_cases: Retrieving student enrollment and grade data from academic analytics agents
Managing attendance records from student success monitoring agents
Accessing IEP and special education data from special ed coordination agents
Integrating student data with EdTech platforms from LMS integration agents
not_for: Higher education without K-12 enrollment and regulatory context
Corporate learning management without student FERPA compliance
Non-educational data without student information system context
best_when: A K-12 school district using Infinite Campus wants AI agents to automate student analytics, attendance monitoring, data integration with EdTech tools, and state reporting workflows.
avoid_when: FERPA+COPPA: Student educational records are protected under FERPA. Data for students under 13 has additional COPPA protections. Parental consent required for non-directory information sharing. District data sharing agreements (DSAs) mandatory for third-party access.

auth.notes: Infinite Campus uses OAuth 2.0 and API key for API access. District-level credentials with student and staff data scopes. EdTech Partner Program for third-party integrations. FERPA compliance built into access controls. Rostering integration via OneRoster standard.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — K-12 district enterprise pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-student district pricing; state consortium pricing available
pricing.notes: Minneapolis, Minnesota. Founded 1993. US-developed and US-headquartered K-12 SIS. Used by 2,000+ school districts serving 7M+ students. Competes with PowerSchool and Skyward. State-hosted version available. Strong state reporting capabilities.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: FERPA+COPPA: Student educational records protected — district data sharing agreement required
No public MCP server — OAuth2 and API key with EdTech partner program
No webhooks — polling required for attendance and grade updates
Students under 13 require COPPA compliance — parental consent for data sharing
OneRoster standard available for rostering — preferred for LMS integrations
IEP and special education data has additional sensitivity beyond standard FERPA
agent_readiness.security_notes: Student educational records. FERPA, COPPA, SOC2. OAuth2 + API key. US data residency. DSA required. Children's data extra protections.

security_score_components.security_notes: Student educational records. FERPA, COPPA, SOC2. OAuth2 + API key. US data residency. Children's data protections mandatory.
